title: column value change caused by distinct
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
after executing the 1st query ,please wait for a minute to continue to execute the 2nd query
```
DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS test;
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test;
USE test;
CREATE TABLE t1 (
    c1 INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    c3 VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    c4 INT NULL,
    c5 DATE NOT NULL,
    c6 VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (c1)
);

CREATE TABLE t3 (
    c1 INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    c2 INT NOT NULL,
    c3 INT NOT NULL,
    c4 YEAR NOT NULL,
    c5 TIME NULL,
    c6 TINYINT NULL,
    c7 SMALLINT NULL,
    c8 MEDIUMINT NULL,
    c9 BIGINT NULL,
    c10 LONGTEXT NULL,
    c11 VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    c12 TINYTEXT NULL,
    c13 TINYBLOB NULL,
    c14 SET('x','y','z') NULL,
    c15 TINYINT(1) NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (c1)
);

INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6) VALUES (3584, 'sample_AQJP3FCb7PX46hF2d3VoKsPIHtIgzieVgOK1Ue7iSbNProjjh', 'sample_v', 36, '2025-09-07', 'sample_J');
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6) VALUES (954, 'sample_0kfPnPKeUjkycwqHxj5OtQ8', 'sample_sQ', 90, '2025-10-10', 'sample_C');

SELECT 30 AS col_1, tlr6.c1 AS col_2, tlr6.c1 AS col_3 FROM t1 AS tlr6 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 83 AS col_1, ugb78.c3 AS col_2, ugb78.c15 AS col_3 FROM t3 AS ugb78;
SELECT DISTINCT 30 AS col_1, tlr6.c1 AS col_2, tlr6.c1 AS col_3 FROM t1 AS tlr6 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 83 AS col_1, ugb78.c3 AS col_2, ugb78.c15 AS col_3 FROM t3 AS ugb78;
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
after  adding  distinct in 1st query,the col_2's value appear Null
```
mysql> SELECT 30 AS col_1, tlr6.c1 AS col_2, tlr6.c1 AS col_3 FROM t1 AS tlr6 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 83 AS col_1, ugb78.c3 AS col_2, ugb78.c15 AS col_3 FROM t3 AS ugb78;

| col_1 | col_2 | col_3 |
+-------+-------+-------+
|    30 |   954 |   954 |
|    30 |  3584 |  3584 |
|    83 |  2340 |  NULL |
|    83 |   994 |  NULL |
|    83 |  5873 |  NULL |
|    83 |  2120 |  NULL |

|    83 |  4869 |  NULL |
|    83 |  8014 |  NULL |
|    83 |  5257 |  NULL |

10 rows in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> SELECT DISTINCT 30 AS col_1, tlr6.c1 AS col_2, tlr6.c1 AS col_3 FROM t1 AS tlr6 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 83 AS c
ol_1, ugb78.c3 AS col_2, ugb78.c15 AS col_3 FROM t3 AS ugb78;
+-------+-------+-------+
| col_1 | col_2 | col_3 |
+-------+-------+-------+
|    30 |   954 |   954 |

|    83 |  2340 |  NULL |
|    83 |  NULL |  NULL |
|    83 |  NULL |  NULL |
|    83 |  5257 |  NULL |
|    83 |  8014 |  NULL |
|    83 |  NULL |  NULL |

10 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO t4 (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT id, name, value FROM t4 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT 1 AS col_1, t4.id AS col_2, t4.value AS col_3 FROM t4 WHERE t4.value < 20;
key_bug_features: SELECT DISTINCT causes unexpected NULL values in column results
